---
title: "Template Title"
author: "Your Name"
date: "The Date"
output:
    mayodown::mayohtml:
        code_folding: hide
params:
    mouse_table: "data/mouse-table.csv"
    spine_trab: "data/spine_trabecular_data.csv"
    met_data: "data/femur_metaphysis_data.csv"
    dia_data: "data/femur_diaphysis_data.csv"
    outliers: !r |
        list(
            spine = c(), 
            met = c(), 
            dia = c()
        )
    groups: !r c()
    digits: 3
    measures: "default"
---

# Background

<!-- START BACKGROUND INFO -->
<!-- Describe the experiment, genotypes/treatments, and hypotheses here. -->


<!-- END BACKGROUND INFO -->

```{r knitr-opts, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    fig.height = 3
)
options(digits = params$digits)
```

```{r setup, collapse = TRUE}
library(klct)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r read-data, collapse = TRUE}
mouse_table <- read_mouse_table(params$mouse_table)

# Check which data files are available
has_spine <- !is.null(params$spine_trab) && nzchar(params$spine_trab) &&
    file.exists(params$spine_trab)
has_met <- !is.null(params$met_data) && nzchar(params$met_data) &&
    file.exists(params$met_data)
has_dia <- !is.null(params$dia_data) && nzchar(params$dia_data) &&
    file.exists(params$dia_data)

if (has_spine) {
    spine_trab <- read_trabecular(params$spine_trab,
                                  mouse_table, site = "Spine")
}

if (has_met) {
    met_trab <- read_trabecular(params$met_data,
                                mouse_table, site = "Met")
    met_cort <- read_cortical(params$met_data,
                              mouse_table, site = "Met")
}

if (has_dia) {
    dia_cort <- read_cortical(params$dia_data,
                              mouse_table, site = "Dia")
}
```

```{r process-params, collapse = TRUE}
# Determine the group column name
group_col <- intersect(c("Treatment", "Genotype"), names(mouse_table))[1]

# Order the group factor if group names are supplied
if (length(params$groups) > 0) {
    if (has_spine) {
        spine_trab[[group_col]] <- factor(spine_trab[[group_col]],
                                          levels = params$groups)
    }
    if (has_met) {
        met_trab[[group_col]] <- factor(met_trab[[group_col]],
                                        levels = params$groups)
        met_cort[[group_col]] <- factor(met_cort[[group_col]],
                                        levels = params$groups)
    }
    if (has_dia) {
        dia_cort[[group_col]] <- factor(dia_cort[[group_col]],
                                        levels = params$groups)
    }
}

# Exclude site-specific outliers
if (has_spine && length(params$outliers$spine) > 0) {
    spine_trab <- spine_trab |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$spine))
}
if (has_met && length(params$outliers$met) > 0) {
    met_trab <- met_trab |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$met))
    met_cort <- met_cort |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$met))
}
if (has_dia && length(params$outliers$dia) > 0) {
    dia_cort <- dia_cort |> filter(!(AS %in% params$outliers$dia))
}

# Collect all unique outlier AS numbers for the summary table
all_outliers <- unique(c(params$outliers$spine, params$outliers$met,
                         params$outliers$dia))

# Resolve the measures parameter:
#   "default" or missing -> NULL (use function defaults)
#   "all"                -> "all" (analyze every detected measure)
measures_param <- if (!exists("measures", where = params) ||
                      identical(params$measures, "default")) NULL else params$measures
```

```{r outlier-table, results = "asis", eval = length(all_outliers) > 0, echo = length(all_outliers) > 0}
cat("## Outliers Excluded\n\n")

outlier_info <- mouse_table |>
    filter(AS %in% all_outliers) |>
    select(AS, Sex, all_of(group_col)) |>
    mutate(
        Spine = ifelse(AS %in% params$outliers$spine, "X", ""),
        Met = ifelse(AS %in% params$outliers$met, "X", ""),
        Dia = ifelse(AS %in% params$outliers$dia, "X", "")
    )

knitr::kable(outlier_info)
```

<!-- START OUTLIER INFO -->
<!-- Describe the reason(s) for excluding outliers, if relevant (e.g., broken met). -->


<!-- END OUTLIER INFO -->

## Original Data

`r xfun::embed_file(params$mouse_table, text = basename(params$mouse_table))`

`r if (has_spine) xfun::embed_file(params$spine_trab, text = basename(params$spine_trab))`

`r if (has_met) xfun::embed_file(params$met_data, text = basename(params$met_data))`

`r if (has_dia) xfun::embed_file(params$dia_data, text = basename(params$dia_data))`


```{r spine-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
cat("\n\n# Lumbar Vertebra\n\n## Trabecular {.tabset}\n\n### Parametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r sp-tb-param, results = "asis", eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
compare_groups(spine_trab, measures = measures_param,
               test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r spine-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
cat("\n\n### Nonparametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r sp-tb-np, results = "asis", eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
compare_groups(spine_trab, measures = measures_param,
               test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r spine-combined-param-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Parametric)\n\n")
```

```{r sp-tb-combined-param, results = "asis", eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
spine_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r spine-combined-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)\n\n")
```

```{r sp-tb-combined-np, results = "asis", eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
spine_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r spine-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
cat("\n\n### Plots\n\n")
```

```{r sp-tb-plot, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
plot_groups(spine_trab, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

```{r spine-combined-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes Plots\n\n")
```

```{r sp-tb-combined-plot, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
spine_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

```{r spine-data-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
cat("\n\n### Data\n\n")
```

```{r sp-tb-dat, eval = has_spine, include = has_spine}
print_data(spine_trab)
```


```{r met-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n# Femoral Metaphysis\n\n## Trabecular {.tabset}\n\n### Parametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-tb-param, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
compare_groups(met_trab, measures = measures_param,
               test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-tb-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Nonparametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-tb-np, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
compare_groups(met_trab, measures = measures_param,
               test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-tb-combined-param-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Parametric)\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-tb-combined-param, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
met_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-tb-combined-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-tb-combined-np, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
met_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-tb-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Plots\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-tb-plot, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
plot_groups(met_trab, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

```{r met-tb-combined-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes Plots\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-tb-combined-plot, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
met_trab |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

```{r met-tb-data-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Data\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-tb-dat, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
print_data(met_trab)
```

```{r met-ct-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n## Cortical {.tabset}\n\n### Parametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-ct-param, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
compare_groups(met_cort, measures = measures_param,
               test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-ct-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Nonparametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-ct-np, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
compare_groups(met_cort, measures = measures_param,
               test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-ct-combined-param-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Parametric)\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-ct-combined-param, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
met_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-ct-combined-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-ct-combined-np, results = "asis", eval = has_met, include = has_met}
met_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r met-ct-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Plots\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-ct-plot, eval = has_met, include = has_met, fig.height = 6}
plot_groups(met_cort, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

```{r met-ct-combined-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes Plots\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-ct-combined-plot, eval = has_met, include = has_met, fig.height = 6}
met_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

```{r met-ct-data-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
cat("\n\n### Data\n\n")
```

```{r f-met-ct-dat, eval = has_met, include = has_met}
print_data(met_cort)
```


```{r dia-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
cat("\n\n# Femoral Diaphysis\n\n## Cortical {.tabset}\n\n### Parametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r f-dia-ct-param, results = "asis", eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
compare_groups(dia_cort, measures = measures_param,
               test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r dia-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
cat("\n\n### Nonparametric Results\n\n")
```

```{r f-dia-ct-np, results = "asis", eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
compare_groups(dia_cort, measures = measures_param,
               test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r dia-combined-param-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Parametric)\n\n")
```

```{r f-dia-ct-combined-param, results = "asis", eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
dia_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "parametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r dia-combined-np-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes (Nonparametric)\n\n")
```

```{r f-dia-ct-combined-np, results = "asis", eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
dia_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    compare_groups(measures = measures_param, test = "nonparametric") |>
    print_results()
```

```{r dia-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
cat("\n\n### Plots\n\n")
```

```{r f-dia-ct-plot, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia, fig.height = 6}
plot_groups(dia_cort, measures = measures_param) |> print_plots()
```

```{r dia-combined-plots-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
cat("\n\n### Combined Sexes Plots\n\n")
```

```{r f-dia-ct-combined-plot, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia, fig.height = 6}
dia_cort |>
    mutate(Sex = "B") |>
    plot_groups(measures = measures_param, title = NULL) |>
    print_plots()
```

```{r dia-data-header, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
cat("\n\n### Data\n\n")
```

```{r f-dia-ct-dat, eval = has_dia, include = has_dia}
print_data(dia_cort)
```


# Session Info

Time this report was most recently updated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%c')`

```{r klct-ver, results = "asis", echo = FALSE}
klct_ver <- packageVersion("klct")

cat(
    sprintf(
        "This report was generated using the 
        [klct](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/) package, version 
        [%s](https://github.com/KhoslaLab/klct/tree/v%s).",
        klct_ver,
        klct_ver
    ))
```

```{r session-info, collapse = TRUE}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
